description: Represents an application graph generated from the different logs collected by the app agents.

kind.description: Filters by application graph kind. Must not be combined with workloadGroupSetHashes.
kind.title: kind

name.description: The name of the application graph.
name.title: name

nodes.description: The nodes in the application graph.
nodes.title: nodes

traceLinks.description: If this is an application graph for a trace ID, this is the flat list of all links for this application graph.
traceLinks.title: traceLinks

workloadGroupSetHash.description: The hash of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetHash.title: workloadGroupSetHash

workloadGroupSetLabel.description: The label format of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetLabel.title: workloadGroupSetLabel

title: AppGraph
